creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
Index: security/vuxml/vuln.xml =================================================================== --- security/vuxml/vuln.xml (revision 408968) +++ security/vuxml/vuln.xml (working copy) @@ -57,6 +57,32 @@ * Do not forget port variants (linux-f10-libxml2, libxml2, etc.) --> + + libgcrypt -- side-channel attack on ECDH + + + libgcrypt + 1.6.4 + + + + +

GnuPG reports:

+
+

Mitigate side-channel attack on ECDH with Weierstrass curves.

+
+ + + + CVE-2015-7511 + https://lists.gnupg.org/pipermail/gnupg-announce/2016q1/000384.html + + + 2016-02-09 + 2016-02-16 + + + xdelta3 -- buffer overflow vulnerability
